text:
おっつかれさまー！
ここはやっぱり快適だね！

でもブレイバーは、いつまでもここで
のんびりしてるわけにもいかないよ。

まだまだ訓練しておきたいエリアは
いろいろ残ってるし
次はどうするか考えなきゃ。

もちろん、またあなたとね。
声掛けるから、

Nicely done! Sure feels a lot more comfortable
here, doesn't it?

But we Bravers can't let ourselves get too
lazy in a place like this.

We've still got places to go and training to
push through.
I better get to planning our next run.

I wouldn't think of doing anything without you
though, so just be sure you're always ready!
